description: Netdata是一个实时性能和健康监控解决方案，帮助您可视化并理解系统的行为。
release_note:
- v2.10.3 fixes an eBPF per-PID shared-memory pool leak that could fill the pool and peg a CPU core.
- SNMP uptime collection now uses snmpEngineTime first to avoid TimeTicks wraparound, while keeping the existing systemUptime metric name.
- Dynamic configuration name validation and go.d/powerstore hardware decoding were fixed.
